en.text: probably from H6738 and H0410 with a prepositional prefix; in (the) shadow (i.e. protection) of God; Betsalel, the name of two Israelites

senses.gloss_en: probably from H6738 and H0410 with a prepositional prefix; in (the) shadow (i.e. protection) of God; Betsalel, the name of two Israelites
